periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 68, with temperatures rising to around 72 overnight. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 10am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10am and noon. Mostly cloudy. High near 79, with temperatures falling to around 77 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 57, with temperatures rising to around 59 overnight. North northwest wind 2 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

periods.name: Monday
